case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JORGE LUIS MORALES VALENCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. (506)
